hero.title:
Developer-centric blockchain
infrastructure for Sui app
hero.description:
Enoki gives developers simple APIs to integrate on-chain features into any application.
Easy tools, game changing capabilities, all via a simple monthly subscription.

connect.title: Portable wallets, without the headache
connect.description: Users can take their wallets with them, and connect to any application on Sui.
connect.featureOne: Create and manage wallets with Google, Apple, Facebook and more
connect.featureTwo: Support available across the Sui ecosystem
